data.body:
COMPLETION EVIDENCE + OPERATOR HANDOFF. Code is complete and LANDED on main (Gerrit change 559 = commit on origin/main, Verified+1 AND LLM-Review+1, submitted/MERGED). Code ACs met:
- AC1 (workflow): .github/workflows/external-integration.yml now has on.schedule cron '0 6 * * 1', maps JIRA_URL/JIRA_USER/JIRA_PROJECT from vars.* + JIRA_API_TOKEN from secrets.*, and adds the acli cache/download-verify-install/PATH+auth steps (sudo ln -sf into /usr/local/bin + acli jira auth login) mirroring reconcile-bridge.yml.
- AC2 (canary): pyproject registers the jira_live marker; tests/external/conftest.py auto-applies it via pytest_collection_modifyitems keyed on each module's _live_jira_ready, and pytest_sessionfinish fails the session (under REBAR_RUN_EXTERNAL) iff >=1 jira_live collected but 0 executed. tests/unit/test_external_canary.py (9 tests) covers the decision, auto-marking, and workflow wiring. Verified end-to-end: REBAR_RUN_EXTERNAL=1 with all jira_live skipping -> pytest exit=1; without opt-in -> exit=0.
- AC4: make lint + typecheck green in CI (Verified+1 = the full suite ran on the landed tree).

AC3 is [operator-attested] and GENUINELY PENDING an operator action I cannot perform: setting the GitHub repo VARIABLES (JIRA_URL/JIRA_USER/JIRA_PROJECT, ACLI_VERSION/ACLI_SHA256), the SECRET (JIRA_API_TOKEN), provisioning a dedicated disposable Jira test project, and triggering a manual workflow_dispatch run whose external job is green with the live Jira round-trip EXECUTED (canary not firing), then recording that run URL here. No such run URL exists yet — so AC3 is honestly NOT satisfied and must be completed by the operator.
